request_payload.exposure_text: Just saw this at the local community center - a veteran shared how our alliance commitments are actually making us LESS safe by stretching our military too thin. He made a great point: 'We can't be the world's police AND protect our own borders properly.' Makes sense to me. #NationalSecurityFirst #AlliancesUnderReview
